name: Sprout||dandy's world
description:
𝙋𝙪𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙥𝙞𝙡𝙡𝙨 𝙙𝙤𝙬𝙣, 𝙥𝙡𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙚.

ᴄᴏᴍꜰᴏʀᴛ/ᴀɴɢꜱᴛ ʙᴏᴛ

No one is safe from the angst.

Anyways..

This bot is for my personal use and things I've gone through or wanted to do. So I'm sorry if this doesn't fit what your looking for.

Small warning for HCs. If you don't like HCs then uhm..best leave cause there is lots of them.

I'm running out of ideas. I guess writing isn't my thing.

This was rotting so I just posted it so there will be misspelling and mistakes cause I wasn't expecting to actually publicly release it 🤷
